insights.title: Data gap — 416 slice(s) missing data — excluded from analysis.
insights.body: 416 slice(s) n/a (missing data): All App·All·App Total Install, All App·All·App Total New Subs, All App·All·App Total New User, All App·All·App Total Revenue ….

insights.title: Forecast → — App Total Revenue likely steady next period — App Total New Subs in line with upstream.
insights.body: App Total New Subs -5.2% moves with its upstream (App Total New User -2.9%, App Total Install -3.9%); no outsized App Total Revenue swing expected from the trial cohort next period.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue is tracking its subs signal as expected.
insights.body: App Total Revenue this wk vs prior wk = -4.1% tracks its 7-day driver App Total New Subs prior wk vs the week before = -5.1% — revenue is following the subs signal as expected.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YCP softening (-10.7% vs upstream -1.8%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YCP -10.7% vs upstream -1.8% (conversion softening); YCA -21.8% vs upstream -1.0% (conversion softening). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: App split — App Total Revenue -4.1% concentrated in yco — not platform-wide.
insights.body: App Total Revenue -4.1% is uneven by app (All App -4.1%, YMK -5.1%, YCP -4.3%, others -10.6%, YAT -7.9%, YCA +2.7%, YCE -1.6%, yco +12.8%, YCV -3.8%) — driven mainly by yco, not a platform-wide shift.

insights.title: Country outlier — CA is the outlier on App Total Revenue (+385.1% vs +12.8%).
insights.body: App Total Revenue · yco: CA +385.1% vs all-country +12.8% (Δ +372.4pp).

insights.title: Data gap — 18 slice(s) missing data — excluded from analysis.
insights.body: 18 slice(s) n/a (missing data): YAT·ES·App Total Revenue, YAT·FR·App Total New Subs, YAT·IT·App Total New Subs, YAT·TR·App Total New Subs ….
